title: meerkatx's wolf variant changer
description: This datapack/mod lets you easily change the variant of your pet wolf.
body:
# meerkatx's wolf variant changer Spend hours wandering around a snow biome looking for a rare snowy wolf? Have an old friend you want to give a new coat of ~~paint~~ fur? This datapack (or mod) is for you! Swap your wolf's coat with style and ease! Note: In the mod version it is currently impossible to obtain the items through the creative inventory, you need to craft them. (or use the command)
crafting recipes Use a emerald, a bone, and one item from this list to make your own wolf fur dye today!*

| wolf type | crafting component | |---------------------|:------------------:| | pale | spruce sapling | | woods | oak sapling | | ashen | sweet berries | | black | podzol | | chestnut | mossy cobblestone | | rusty | jungle sapling | | spotted | acacia sapling | | striped | terracotta | | snowy | snow block | --- Once you have your wolf fur dye, just drop it on your wolf, and enjoy! *we are not liable for accidental changes of the genetic structure of your wolf.
If you're playing in creative mode, use the command below to give yourself all of the wolf dyes. ``` /function mktx_wolf_color:give ``` Want the same thing for cats? Try [meerkatx's cat recolorizer](https://modrinth.com/datapack/meerkatx-cat-recolorizer)! --- ![minecraft wolves!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/V38nABbE/images/f2288ee23a5a340f96e863ec4e8381cf9274e9fa.png)
